---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Pegasus Dashboard
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: cptcr
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome 130, Firefox 135]
- **Node.js version**: [e.g., 20.11.0]
- **Dashboard version/commit**: [e.g., v0.1.0 or commit hash]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here, including error logs or console output.
